abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Trick Shot
abilities.text: Once per activation. After this model resolves an attack action targeting an enemy which received at least one raise, this model draws a card.

actions.name: Hail of Bullets
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this action receives a raise, deal 1 damage to enemy models within (r)2" of the target.

triggers.name: Ricochet
triggers.text: Deal 1 damage to a different model within 3" of the target.

triggers.name: Quick Reflexes
triggers.text: Declare this action again, targeting a different model.

triggers.name: Vantage Point
triggers.text: Enemy only. Make a Scheme marker anywhere in the area between this model and the target.

actions.name: Exhibition Shooting
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. The TN of this action is equal to the distance in inches between this model and target Scheme marker. Make a Scheme marker within 4" of the target, then remove the target.

triggers.name: Showin' Off
triggers.text: This model gains a Fast token.

triggers.name: Shot to Pieces
triggers.text: If the target is an enemy marker, draw a card.
